task_description: Merge feat/spot-tips into spec/quality-and-tooling-hardening, resolving all 4 merge conflicts while preserving all spot-tips functionality and uprating the code to meet the quality-and-tooling-hardening best practices.

verification.summary: RSpec: 904 examples, 0 failures. Jest: 104/105 suites pass, 1037/1037 tests pass. The single failing suite (copy-vendor-assets) is due to Google Fonts download timeout - a network environment constraint, not a code issue. All spot-tip property tests, filter engine tests, marker tests, SCSS parity test, and ASCII compliance test pass.
